message:
🌱 Add ollama: Compatibility with new OpenAI responses API mission (#976)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-9659-compatibility-with-new-openai-responses-api",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Compatibility with new OpenAI responses API",
+    "description": "Compatibility with new OpenAI responses API. Requested by 62+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis feature requires a recent Ollama version with Responses API support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the OpenAI Responses API",
+        "description": "OpenAI introduced a new Responses API as an alternative to the Chat Completions API. It provides enhanced capabilities including built-in tool use, structured output support, and agent-like functionality.\n\nOllama is tracking this API for compatibility. See the [OpenAI docs](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/responses-vs-chat-completions) for details on the differences."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check Responses API compatibility",
+        "description": "Test if your Ollama version supports the Responses API endpoint:\n```bash\ncurl -s http://localhost:11434/v1/responses \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"llama3\", \"input\": \"Hello\"}' | head -20\n```\nNote: This feature may still be in development. Check the [source issue](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/issues/9659) for the latest status."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify compatibility",
+        "description": "If the Responses API is supported, verify it works with your tools. The existing Chat Completions API (`/v1/chat/completions`) remains fully supported and is not being deprecated."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The Ollama team is tracking OpenAI Responses API compatibility. The existing Chat Completions API remains fully supported.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
